description: Resource type definition for an Amazon Transcribe Medical Transcription Job

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the medical transcription job
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the medical transcription job

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MedicalTranscriptionJobName.description: A unique name for the medical transcription job
MedicalTranscriptionJobName.markdownDescription:
A unique name for the medical transcription job

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 200  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-zA-Z._-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

TranscriptionJobStatus.description: The status of the medical transcription job
TranscriptionJobStatus.markdownDescription:
The status of the medical transcription job

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: QUEUED | IN_PROGRESS | FAILED | COMPLETED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LanguageCode.description: The language code for the language spoken in the input media file. Must be en-US.
LanguageCode.markdownDescription:
The language code for the language spoken in the input media file. Must be en-US.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

MediaSampleRateHertz.description: The sample rate of the audio in hertz
MediaSampleRateHertz.markdownDescription:
The sample rate of the audio in hertz

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: Replacement

MediaFormat.description: The format of the input media file
MediaFormat.markdownDescription:
The format of the input media file

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: mp3 | mp4 | wav | flac | ogg | amr | webm | m4a  
Update requires: Replacement

Media.description: Describes the Amazon S3 location of the media file
Media.markdownDescription:
Describes the Amazon S3 location of the media file

---

Required: Yes  
Type:   
Update requires: Replacement

Transcript.description: Provides the Amazon S3 URI for the transcript
Transcript.markdownDescription:

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationTime.markdownDescription:
The date and time the medical transcription job was created

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Settings.description: Settings for the medical transcription job
Settings.markdownDescription:
Settings for the medical transcription job

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: Replacement

Specialty.description: The medical specialty represented in the media
Specialty.markdownDescription:
The medical specialty represented in the media

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: PRIMARYCARE  
Update requires: Replacement

Type.description: Whether the input media is a dictation or conversation
Type.markdownDescription:
Whether the input media is a dictation or conversation

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CONVERSATION | DICTATION  
Update requires: Replacement

Tags.description: Tags associated with the medical transcription job
Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags associated with the medical transcription job

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: Replacement

MediaFileUri.markdownDescription:
